name: Rice Souffle with Raspberry Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine milk, rice butter, salt, and lemon peel in a 2-quart saucepan.
2. Cook over medium heat for 30 to 40 minutes until the rice absorbs all of the milk.
3. Remove from heat; cool. Beat egg yolks and confectioners' sugar in a medium bowl until light-colored and fluffy. Stir into cooled rice.
4. Whip egg whites in a large bowl until soft peaks form. Add granulated sugar 1/2 cup at a time, beating until glossy and stiff peaks form. Fold egg white mixture into the rice mixture.
5. Pour into a greased and powdered with powdered sugar (13 x 9 x 2 inch) pan. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F for 45 to 50 minutes or until set and golden brown. Cut into 18 squares. Serve warm with Raspberry sauce.
Raspberry Sauce
1. Combine raspberries, sugar, 1/2 cup of the water, and lemon juice in a small saucepan.
2. Cook over low heat for 10 to 15 minutes, stirring occasionally until the raspberries fall apart.
3. Remove from heat; strain through a fine-mesh sieve to remove seeds.
4. Combine remaining 1/4 cup water with cornstarch in a small bowl.
5. Return sauce to heat, add cornstarch mixture. Cook, stirring, for 2 to 3 minutes more or until thickened.
6. Serve the sauce drizzled over individual servings of rice souffle.
Makes 16 servings.
